app.name: EcoMetrics
app.tagline: Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform for India

hero.title: Understand Your
hero.subtitle: Calculate, track, and reduce your environmental impact with India-specific data. Join the movement towards a sustainable future.
hero.imageAlt: Aerial view of a forest with a footprint-shaped clearing, symbolizing human impact on nature

education.title: What is Carbon Footprint?
education.description: A carbon footprint is the total amount of greenhouse gases (including carbon dioxide and methane) generated by our actions. It is measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent per year.
education.whyItMatters: India is the third-largest emitter globally. Understanding your footprint helps combat climate change, protect biodiversity, and build a sustainable future for generations.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.description: Cars, buses, trains, and flights contribute significantly to personal emissions.

electricity.title: Electricity Consumption
electricity.description: Power generation from coal and gas releases large amounts of CO2.

food.title: Food Production
food.description: Agriculture, especially meat production, generates substantial greenhouse gases.

waste.title: Waste Generation
waste.description: Landfills produce methane, a potent greenhouse gas.

impact.title: Environmental Impact
impact.subtitle: Carbon emissions affect our planet in many ways. Understanding these impacts motivates change.
impact.calculatedSubtitle: We analyze five key lifestyle categories to estimate your personal emissions.
impact.tipsSubtitle: Small changes in daily habits can make a significant difference.

globalWarming.title: Global Warming
globalWarming.description: Rising temperatures affect ecosystems and weather patterns worldwide.

climateChange.title: Climate Change
climateChange.description: Long-term shifts in temperature and weather patterns disrupt livelihoods.

deforestation.title: Deforestation
deforestation.description: Forests are cleared for agriculture, reducing CO2 absorption capacity.

airPollution.title: Air Pollution
airPollution.description: Burning fossil fuels releases harmful pollutants affecting health.

biodiversity.title: Biodiversity Loss
biodiversity.description: Species extinction accelerates as habitats are destroyed by climate change.

extremeWeather.title: Extreme Weather Events
extremeWeather.description: More frequent floods, droughts, and cyclones threaten communities.

publicTransport.title: Use Public Transport
publicTransport.description: Switch to buses or metro for daily commute to cut emissions significantly.

ledLights.title: Switch to LED Lights
ledLights.description: LED bulbs use up to 75% less energy than incandescent bulbs.

solarPanels.title: Install Solar Panels
solarPanels.description: Generate clean energy and reduce grid electricity dependency.

reduceFoodWaste.title: Reduce Food Waste
reduceFoodWaste.description: Plan meals and store food properly to minimize waste.

recycle.title: Recycle
recycle.description: Separate and recycle paper, plastic, and metal waste.

plantTrees.title: Plant Trees
plantTrees.description: Trees absorb CO2 and improve air quality in your community.

stats.sectionSubtitle: Key facts about carbon emissions in India and globally.

tipsCarousel.title: Quick Sustainability Tip
items: Switch off appliances when not in use.
Walk for short distances instead of driving.
Reduce food waste by planning meals ahead.
Switch to LED bulbs to save energy.
Unplug chargers when not in use.
Fix leaks to save water and energy.
Air dry clothes instead of using a dryer.

calculator.title: Carbon Footprint Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Enter your lifestyle details to calculate your India-specific carbon footprint.
calculator.treesOffset: Your emissions require {{count}} trees annually for offset.

tracker.title: Carbon Tracker
tracker.subtitle: Track your saved calculations and monitor improvement over time.
tracker.emptyDesc: Start by calculating your carbon footprint to track your progress.
tracker.emptyPeriodDesc: No saved calculations match the selected {{period}} view. Try another period or add a new calculation.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Visualize your carbon footprint trends and progress.
dashboard.noDataDesc: Complete a carbon footprint calculation to view your analytics dashboard.
dashboard.badgesLinkDesc: {{earned}} of {{total}} badges unlocked — view your journey

planner.title: Carbon Reduction Planner
planner.subtitle: Set a target and get a personalized weekly plan to reduce your footprint.
planner.basedOn: Based on your annual footprint of {{footprint}}
planner.calculateFirstDesc: Complete a carbon footprint calculation before creating a reduction plan.

greenStarter.name: Green Starter
greenStarter.description: Complete your first carbon footprint calculation.

ecoLearner.name: Eco Learner
ecoLearner.description: Achieve a carbon score of 60 or above.

ecoWarrior.name: Eco Warrior
ecoWarrior.description: Complete 50% of your reduction planner tasks.

climateChampion.name: Climate Champion
climateChampion.description: Reduce your footprint by 10% compared to your first calculation.

earthGuardian.name: Earth Guardian
earthGuardian.description: Achieve Excellent score and complete all planner tasks.

badgesPage.title: Your Badges
badgesPage.subtitle: Progress through your sustainability adventure — earn milestones as you reduce your footprint.
badgesPage.roadmapHint: Follow the path from Green Starter to Earth Guardian
badgesPage.emptyDesc: Complete your first carbon calculation to begin earning badges.
badgesPage.shareFallback: Sharing not supported — badge PNG downloaded instead.
badgesPage.exportHint: Download or share the selected badge as an image.
badgesPage.exportLockedHint: Earn this badge to download it as an image.

footer.mission: Empowering Indians to understand, track, and reduce their carbon footprint for a sustainable future.
footer.madeWith: Made with love for Planet Earth
